title: Mycelial Crisis
description:
NOT STAR TREK MOD!!!
An expansion for the original Mushroom Island! Mushroom World and mycelium series have been added, and more things will be updated in the future!
body:
I found out that the contents of Minecraft Mushroom Island were hollow, with only a lone island and a herd of unknown red bulls, so I decided to make this mod.

The story of the mod takes place in a Minecraft save like usual, but here the mycelium has mutated with the intention of taking over the world. You must go deep into their lair, the Mycelium Dimension, and kill their leader: the Crimson Mycelium King. In this way, you will be able to completely defeat the mycelium forces.

The dangerous mycelial dimension is no longer the same as the original Mushroom Island, and there will be deadly monsters waiting for you underground...

Anyway, this mod is pretty rudimentary at the moment, and I hope you guys enjoy it and support my development!

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3b911c8212b1d73702a3a938958401f20c1b186_0.webp)
